channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipping, 9th March
item.description:
The sofa joined the party Saturday night into Sunday morning. That’s FOUR FLY TIPS IN THIS LOCATION IN THE LAST 8 DAYS!!! Is this the Third World or Cheltenham?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17, Alstone Lane, Alstone, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Covers, Gratings & Frames problem, 9th March
item.description:
PLEASE REPLACE GULLY GRATE X 1 2 WAY TRAFFIC LIGHTS MARKED (Broken Chamber Cover/Frame)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog poo everywhere, 9th March
item.description:
Recently, there has been a lot of dog excrement left on the pavement along Douro Road and the roads surrounding the green. There's piles of it dotted around and it's disgusting. Whoever is letting this happen and not picking up after their dog is despicable.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Douro Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 9th March
item.description:
Permanent repair for NWD Road closure 28 day carriage way pothole 1800x1100x50mm (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other problem, 9th March
item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other problem, 9th March
item.description:
ENWD PLEASE REMOVE DEBRIS FROM CARRIAGEWAY 4m X 2.5m ROAD CLOSURE MARKED (Debris/Obstruction in CW)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Double mattress - dumped, 9th March
item.description:
Double mattress dumped several days ago - presumably to join the single mattress that was dumped there last week. The longer that rubbish remains, the more people think that it's OK to dump rubbish there.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 70;72;74;76;78;80, Coppice Gate, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drop kerb at exit from Latheram House 42 Clarence St is dangerously sloped, 9th March
item.description:
The main access to Latheram House (69 dwellings for over 60s) is from Clarence St opposite Wilson Museum. The drop kerb from the pavement on town centre side is dangerously sloped and ridged for mobility scooter/wheeled walkers and anyone tripping and falling would land in the busy road. In addition, there is a dropped kerb outside the library which cannot be used as it is blocked by a disable parking bay. Yhe Bay should be moved to be opposite the Latheram House exit to provide a safer crossing for the disabled.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 42, Clarence Street, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large tree blocking bridleway, 9th March
item.description:
Path AGR14 is blocked at W3W tactical.exactly.hamsters by an old tree that has now dropped and is totally blocking the path

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Greenway Lane, Gretton, Tewkesbury
